mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Protective Services Removals in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Protective Services Removals serving Salt Lake City. Blair Jones, an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, focuses 100% of his practice on representing injured workers against insurance companies and their lawyers, consistently achieving favorable results. He possesses a diverse legal background, having honed his litigation skills across various jurisdictions and courtrooms. Mr. Jones has successfully represented numerous injured workers in complex workers’ compensation claims, criminal defendants in high-profile cases, and advocated for children and parents in protective services removals. He is licensed in Texas (2007), Colorado (2014), and Utah (2018), and admitted to the U.S. District Courts for the Western District of Texas. His educational background includes a Bachelor's degree from the University of Utah and a Juris Doctor from Western State University College of Law. He is an active member of the Salt Lake County Bar Association, Central Utah Bar Association, J. Rueben Clark Law Society, Williamson County Bar Association, Texas Criminal Defense Lawyer Association, and Williamson County Criminal Defense Lawyer Association. Outside of his legal practice, Mr. Jones enjoys spending time in the mountains with his wife and three children. To consult with Blair Jones regarding your legal needs, contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a free consultation. Contact us at 801-746-0290.
